title: russelia tepicensis
intro: Russelia tepicensis, also known as Coralillo, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its showy, red, coral-like flowers and slender stems. Russelia tepicensis has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight infections, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure, reducing stress, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Russelia tepicensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
